//: build (tsc) compiles only the rootDir-safe, @prune-only subset. The files that import FOREIGN source (apps/extension/src, apps/dashboard route handlers) or run the demo are excluded here and executed via vitest/tsx (on-the-fly transpile), which is how the existing run-comprehensive-tests.ts harness already loads that source headlessly. Correctness of those files is proven by the vitest suites, not by this emit.
